labels.description: the task's description captures agent-direction notes for this project: build/test/lint commands, conventions, and gotchas a working agent must know
labels.name: ATM:context:agent

labels.description: the task's description points at a specific document (file path or URL) and summarizes what it covers, so a later agent can decide whether to read it
labels.name: ATM:context:documentation

labels.description: the task's description flags something that should be reviewed, updated, or altered; not a work item itself, a signal to a human or later agent
labels.name: ATM:context:fixit

labels.description: the task's description poses an open question or ambiguity about the project that a human or later agent should clarify; not a defect, not a work item, a gap in understanding
labels.name: ATM:context:question

labels.description: the task's description names a code repository (path or URL), what it contains, and how to work in it; a later agent reads this to orient
labels.name: ATM:context:repository

labels.description: the task's description references a context resource that has drifted from reality; needs reconciliation or replacement
labels.name: ATM:context:stale

labels.description: optional prioritization: high
labels.name: ATM:priority:high

labels.description: optional prioritization: low
labels.name: ATM:priority:low

labels.description: optional prioritization: medium
labels.name: ATM:priority:medium

labels.description: workflow state: archived; task is no longer active and kept for historical reference; excluded from active-work filters
labels.name: ATM:status:archived

labels.description: workflow state: blocked; task cannot proceed pending something else
labels.name: ATM:status:blocked

labels.description: workflow state: done; task is complete
labels.name: ATM:status:done

labels.description: workflow state: in-progress; someone is actively working on this
labels.name: ATM:status:in-progress

labels.description: workflow state: open; task is not started or is being considered
labels.name: ATM:status:open

labels.description: workflow state: planned; task is scoped and intended but not yet queued for work
labels.name: ATM:status:planned

labels.description: workflow state: review; task is awaiting review/approval
labels.name: ATM:status:review

labels.description: workflow state: todo; task is queued for work
labels.name: ATM:status:todo

labels.description: Bug fix
labels.name: ATM:type:bug

labels.description: task categorization: chore; maintenance, refactoring, tooling
labels.name: ATM:type:chore

labels.description: task categorization: design; producing a spec or design document
labels.name: ATM:type:design

labels.description: task categorization: feature; new functionality to add
labels.name: ATM:type:feature

labels.description: task categorization: task; general work item
labels.name: ATM:type:task
